verses.text: God bids Moses number the men of war from twenty years old, by their tribes. The census. God's army is mustered.

Moses and Aaron take these men and number the congregation, as commanded. Counted. The work is done in obedience.

The whole sum is six hundred thousand three thousand five hundred fifty. The total. A vast host stands ready.

The Levites are not numbered among them, but set over the tabernacle. The Levites. They are reserved for holy service.
